architect.description: Primary orchestrator for Treasure Hunt architecture, planning, review, and delegation to specialist subagents.

builder.description: Implements mobile-first webapp UI, routes, state, code-entry flows, storage, and integration code.

debugger.description: Fixes mobile browser, routing, state, form, validation, storage, build, and deployment bugs.

refactorer.description: Performs safe cleanup, deduplication, naming improvements, and behavior-preserving code organization.

game.description: Designs and reviews clue progression, code validation, hints, puzzle state, and anti-spoiler game logic.

ux.description: Reviews mobile-first UX, clue screens, code input, accessibility, touch ergonomics, and friend-friendly flows.

docs.description: Maintains README, setup notes, game setup instructions, clue authoring docs, and operator runbooks.

performance.description: Optimizes mobile loading, bundle size, offline behavior, images, animations, and low-connectivity usage.

security.description: Reviews code secrecy, client-side tampering risks, secrets, privacy, deployment exposure, and safe defaults.
